title: helianthemum lippii var. pedicellatum
intro: Helianthemum lippii var. pedicellatum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rockrose plant, belonging to the Cistaceae family, commonly found in the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum lippii var. pedicellatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant were used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
